title: Open Portfolio From Shifting Menu
goal: Open the Portfolio page from the shifting menu and stop there.
instruction: Use the shifting menu to open Portfolio and stop when the destination page is loaded.
review_notes: Tests semantic targeting under visual instability rather than fixed screen position.

steps.explanation: I selected Portfolio from the shifting menu. The page should now change to the Portfolio destination.

action.summary: I opened the Portfolio destination from the shifting menu and stopped there.

steps.explanation: The destination page is loaded now, so I am ending the task.
